description: Brands invite followers to rate their food/beverage product on a numeric scale, using casual, friendly language to encourage honest feedback and participation.
structural_recipe: Post a product image or video of the food/beverage item. Caption should include: (1) An invitation phrase like 'جرّبه' (try it) or 'خلك صريح' (be honest), (2) A direct rating question using 'من 10' (out of 10) or similar scale, (3) Casual tone with emojis (coffee, eyes, etc.), (4) Optional brand hashtag or campaign hashtag.
why_it_works: Saudi consumers value authentic peer opinions and direct engagement. The numeric rating system simplifies participation, reducing friction to comment. The emphasis on honesty ('خلك صريح') builds trust and appeals to the cultural value of straightforwardness. Tagging specific hashtags like '#بارنز' creates community identity around the brand.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure product quality is consistently high before soliciting public ratings to avoid negative feedback accumulation
Be prepared to respond professionally to critical reviews; ignoring negative feedback damages brand credibility in Saudi market
The casual tone may not suit premium luxury F&B brands; adapt formality level to brand positioning
